vllm.title: [Refactor][Frontend] Keep all logic about reasoning into one class
vllm.author: gaocegege
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is a quick refactor to get us ready to tackle a few issues like #14399, #14170, #14335, #14511, #14429 and #14490
Right now, we’ve got two separate abstractions of handling reasoning—one for OpenAI chat and another for structured outputs.
But if we want to fix #14399, which involves adding chec

vllm.title: [V1] Support disable_any_whtespace for guidance backend
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This patch makes flexible whitespace handling configurable in the same
way it is for the xgrammar backend.
This also uses the option for both xgrammar and guidance in CI, as we
are seeing infinite newlines causing tests to fail occasionally.
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com

Therefore, I think it should be removed. BTW, I second the change in #12953. After all, all kinds o

vllm.title: [TPU] [Perf] Improve Memory Usage Estimation
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY:

TPU uses ~3GB loading Llama-8B + compiling XLA graphs, which is captured in peak memory
This 3GB was not being used for KV cache as a result
Tweak heuristic to be 2% of weights instead

This improves performance 4%, since we are able to fit more items in the batch
MODEL=meta-llama/Llama-3.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] [torch.compile] Add Dynamo metrics context during compilation
vllm.author: ProExpertProg
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes a crash in the custom compilation logic when compiling for static sizes.
Issue
Currently, when compiling for more than 1 size, vLLM crashes with the following error:
$ vllm serve meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B --compilation_config "{'compile_sizes': [1, 2, 4, 8]}"
...
ERROR 03-27 17:00:10 [co

vllm.title: [V1] TPU - Fix the chunked prompt bug
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR synchronizes tpu_model_runner.py with the latest changes made to gpu_model_runner.py that are related to spec decoding. Specifically, the sampled tokens per request need to be cleared if the request has not processed the whole prompt yet.

vllm.title: [Misc] cli auto show default value
vllm.author: reidliu41
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
ArgumentDefaultsHelpFormatter inherit from HelpFormatter, and it can help to auto show the default value, so update to it.
e.g.
===> $ vllm chat -h
usage: vllm chat [options]

options:
  --api-key API_KEY     API key for OpenAI services. If provided, this api key will overwrite the

Bug:

In V0 engine, we raise a ValueError exception when some LoRA

vllm.title: [CI] Speed up V1 structured output tests
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Instead of creating a new LLM instance per test case, re-use the same
one for as much as possible. This drastically speeds up these tests in
my dev environment with an H100:
before: ~37 minutes
after: ~2.5 minutes
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com
